title: Today's My Only Chance
overview: "Okami, why are you doing this...?" Akazu saves his student Okami from a pervert but in turn gets injured. She invites him home for treatment when Akazu finds out that she had planned to be attacked... "I love you, Mr.Akazu, so please..." Will Akazu fall for Okami's plans?!

title: I'm Glad You See Me as a Woman
overview: Akazu manages to hold himself back that night when he is at Okami's home. But something seems to change inside of him; he just cannot concentrate at work. Okami's attacks won't stop and she finally cuffs him then tells him to search for the key... "It's somewhere in my underwear"... What?!

title: I Want to Be Someone Who's Special to You
overview: "I've never lied to myself about how I feel!" Akazu denied Okami. Since that day, she has not been attending school... Even though Akazu is worried about Okami, he asks himself if he should follow "the rules of being a teacher" or "his feelings as a man". His choice is...?! And what has happened to Okami? Let's find out in this unorthodox love story's finale!!
